message:
fix: Handle BigInt equality in pyEqual via managed field detection

BigInt structs were falling through to tuple element-wise comparison in
pyEqual, which compared the internal Managed struct field-by-field. This
caused allocation metadata to affect equality, making identical BigInt
values appear unequal in ReleaseFast builds.

Added specific detection for BigInt (struct with 'managed' field and 'eql'
method) in the same-type fast path to use the proper eql() method instead.

This fixes test_int_literal failures in batch test runner mode.
